Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Goldsign]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 2''' — A Goldsign is a way to tell who is on what Path at the Gold stage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 3''' — A Goldsign is a miniature Remnant parasite on an individual's limb.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 6''' — A Goldsign can be a venom-green Remnant wrapped around a wrist or a cloud over a head.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 7''' — A Goldsign can be a physical feature like a scarred and twisted face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 8''' — A Goldsign is a bright red circle on the hand.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 15''' — A Goldsign is a mark that can be subtle or hideous.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin's Goldsign flashed during combat.}}

== Blackflame ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — A Goldsign is required to survive in the world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin's Goldsign was quivering.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — A Goldsign is a type of status or power level.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 7''' — Yerin's Goldsign can blur silver.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 8''' — Cassias wears a steel bracer called Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 13''' — Yerin uses a Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 17''' — A Goldsign is a personal identifier or mark, such as a silver bracer.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|'''Ch 20''' — A Goldsign can be possessed without a Remnant.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 2''' — Goldsigns are two silver blades that hang on thin arms over the shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 4''' — A Goldsign can cause hair to become metal strands.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — Yerin and the Blood Shadow's Goldsigns clashed, creating red-and-silver sparks of essence.}}

== Ghostwater ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 2''' — Goldsigns are constructs that Yerin has on her shoulders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 4''' — Goldsigns are used by the Blood Shadow to drive into a target's body.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 13''' — Ziel has a condensed Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-05-ghostwater|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin uses Goldsigns to beckon a dragon.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Goldsigns can pass through armor plates.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin uses Goldsigns to cycle.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 5''' — Yerin's Goldsigns stick out from the back of her armor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 6''' — Yerin uses bladed Goldsigns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin has three sets of Goldsigns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 10''' — Yerin has six Goldsigns.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 19''' — Daji has a Goldsign breastplate.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's Goldsigns look like steel blades growing on metal arms.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 14''' — The Arelius woman has Goldsigns that crackle with bright sparks on her knuckles.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 26''' — Yerin's six Goldsigns are now a bright, vivid scarlet with a metallic gleam.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 21''' — Jai Chen did not have a Goldsign.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 11''' — A Goldsign can be a physical feature like extra weapons growing from the body or a decoration.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 21''' — Yerin's Goldsigns flash in four directions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 24''' — Jai Long's Goldsign consists of sharp fangs of blue light and cheeks split deeply down his jaw.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — Wei Shi Kelsa's white-and-purple flaming tail was not the Goldsign she wanted.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — Yerin extended her Goldsigns.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 6''' — Kelsa exerted control over her Goldsign.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — Yerin uses Goldsigns to launch Striker blades.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 31''' — Yerin releases her Goldsigns to resist spiritual pressure.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 37''' — Pride's Goldsign lines disappear into his robes.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — Lindon and Yerin had withdrawn their Goldsigns.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
